text_block_list.text: King Halo invites me out on a trip one day.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer! This is a genuine first-rate inn!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Today's an occasion to let your hair down! Rest
and unwind to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With this hot spring vacation coupon, you can use
any of the inn's facilities. I hereby grant you the
right to full body relaxation!

That's right. We're making use of the hot spring
vacation coupon we won at the shopping district
before.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've always wanted to try a hot spring
where all the first-rates go.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well... I mean... think of how far away this place
is. I've had my eyes on it for years, but I haven't
had the opportunity to stay.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Also, I decided to invite you when I won these
coupons, so...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! We've got hot springs galore to help us
warm up and de-stress, so I'm giving you the right
to go enjoy them!
choice_data_list: Weren't you about to say something else?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Even if I was, the hot springs are far more
important, so don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Dinner's at seven, so you can do whatever you'd
like until then, okay?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Good! Enjoy your day to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You want to take a bath? Take a bath! You want
to get cozy in your room? Well, I'm not stopping
you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Taking full advantage of your relaxation time is
first-rate! Go forth and make full use of the
facilities available!
And so, I enjoy a nice soak in the hot springs.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Ahhh, that felt so nice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know, I feel kind of bored. It's still only
six o'clock.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I wonder if Trainer's also feeling bored...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Or perhaps not at all.
It's six-thirty now.

Dinner is scheduled for seven, but I decide to find
a seat a little ahead of time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I thought I told you dinner isn't until seven. Why
are you here so early?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well... I came to appreciate the view! The scenery
is part of the relaxation course too, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's so beautiful, and the wind feels amazing right
after a bath.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The last three years have been a whirlwind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With racing constantly on my mind, it feels like
it's been a long time since I've had a break like
this.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's the same for you, isn't it? You even dedicated
your days off to supporting me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think? Were you able to relax
today?
choice_data_list: Yup! I'm ready to get back to it tomorrow!
Yup! I'm ready to get back to it tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You make it sound like you're already
thinking about the next race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, so much for keeping things casual.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, though. Since we're having dinner
together anyway, we might as well begin
discussing plans.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm in the mood for some business as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've had enough relaxing for one day, hehe. Are
you ready to start tackling work again?

And so, King Halo and I enjoy the inn's food while
discussing plans for the near future.

I sense that King Halo and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
